creator: rakuco@FreeBSD.org
text: For the record, the fixes for the `make describe' issues were a stop-gap measure. https://reviews.freebsd.org/D41045 and https://reviews.freebsd.org/D41046 fixed them correctly, and were included in https://reviews.freebsd.org/R11:921530884fe6339528837c7e60a312fc5d9e1804 and https://reviews.freebsd.org/R11:ca8a8ebe109035902fcfc3c842a77b581fc4e4f5
